I have read and understand this section of the policy.
Acknowledgement Introduction: Pedal Group encourages the use of AI in our business, within guardrails to protect sensitive data. This policy sets out how to use AI effectively while protecting sensitive company and customer data. You are responsible for protecting sensitive company information, following data protection laws, and company policies. Actions of AI are done with your approval, in your name. The purpose of this policy is to establish clear guidelines for the safe, ethical, and secure use of AI tools by all Pedal Group employees, contractors, and partners. This policy should be read in conjunction with the Pedal Group Cyber Security Policy - when using AI tools or any other software, you are bound by cyber security policies.
